---
name: Substantive critique
about: Disagreement with the methodology's argument, framework choices, threat taxonomy, design principles, controls, or analytical moves
title: ''
labels: critique
assignees: ''
---

**Where in the work.** Document and section (e.g., paper §2.3, control_matrix.md TP-01, case_studies/echoleak.md §6).

**The critique.** State the disagreement concretely. The most useful critiques engage the substantive claim being made rather than the prose framing.

**Alternative framing or proposal, if any.** What would address the critique. Optional — surfacing the disagreement is itself valuable.

**References that support the critique.** Primary sources, prior work, or empirical observations, where relevant.
